metadata.title: Show All Hidden Files
metadata.description: Show All Hidden Files Localization & Tweaks

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Exact file or folder names to keep hidden everywhere in the vault. Enter one name per line.
ast.target: 在保险库中始终隐藏的精确文件或文件夹名称。每行输入一个名称。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [show-all-hidden-files] unable to enable unsupported file visibility
ast.target: [show-all-hidden-files] 无法启用不支持的文件可见性

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [show-all-hidden-files] unable to restore unsupported file visibility
ast.target: [show-all-hidden-files] 无法恢复不支持的文件可见性

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Show All Hidden Files requires Obsidian desktop with FileSystemAdapter.
ast.target: 显示所有隐藏文件需要带有 FileSystemAdapter 的 Obsidian 桌面版。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Show All Hidden Files is already scanning.
ast.target: 显示所有隐藏文件正在扫描中。

ast.name: name
ast.target: 报告已索引的隐藏文件
